No Poverty.reason: The course syllabus focuses on national strategy, security, and international relations, with no explicit or strong inferred links to poverty eradication or related social protection measures.

Zero Hunger.reason: The course content, centered on national strategy and security, does not include any explicit or strongly inferred topics related to hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The syllabus for 'Seminar in National Strategy' contains no explicit or strongly inferred references to health, well-being, disease prevention, or healthcare systems.

Quality Education.reason: While the course is part of tertiary education, its subject matter does not address the broader goals of quality education, access, or learning outcomes for all levels of education.

Gender Equality.reason: The course syllabus lacks any explicit or strongly inferred content related to gender equality, women's empowerment, or addressing discrimination.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: There is no explicit or strongly inferred evidence in the course description or readings that relates to clean water, sanitation, hygiene, or water resource management.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course content does not explicitly or implicitly cover topics such as energy access, renewable energy, energy efficiency, or clean energy technologies.
